runtime_health.title: Geist service needs attention
runtime_health.description: The local Geist health check failed: {error}. Reconfigure the integration or restart the service.

user.title: Connect to Geist
user.description: Connect to the resident Geist service over its private Unix socket.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Geist
reconfigure.description: The new socket is validated before the integration is reloaded.

error.invalid_socket: Enter an absolute Unix socket path.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Geist service.
error.timeout: The Geist service did not respond in time.
error.invalid_response: The service returned an invalid health response.
error.unsupported_protocol: The service does not support dynamic-tools-v1.
error.not_ready: The model service is not ready.
